phase_statuses.title: Decompose backend org-directory rebuild and tree logic
phase_statuses.objective: Split tree-building and rebuild-persistence responsibilities out of the current manager/repository concentration while keeping `OrgStructureManager` as the stable facade.

acceptance_criteria.text: `OrgStructureManager` and org-directory rebuild persistence no longer directly own all tree projection, stale-entity cleanup, and mutation orchestration in one concentrated pair of files.
existing org-directory router behavior, rebuild summaries, and stable-id rebuild semantics remain unchanged.
org-directory rebuild/tree logic still fails fast on missing actor, broken relationships, and invalid Excel-derived state.

phase_statuses.notes: - Backend org-directory tree and rebuild logic extracted into tree_builder, rebuild_support, and rebuild_mutator with focused pytest coverage.

phase_statuses.title: Decompose frontend org-directory page and hook
phase_statuses.objective: Split the page shell and hook into smaller units for tree rendering, search UI, rebuild controls, and page-state orchestration without changing current page behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: `OrgDirectoryManagement.js` no longer mixes page shell, tab layout, tree rendering, search result rendering, selected-person cards, rebuild widgets, and audit panel markup in one file.
`useOrgDirectoryManagementPage.js` no longer directly owns all search derivation, rebuild orchestration, responsive state, and audit loading logic in one file.
current page interactions, test ids, rebuild behavior, and overview/audit tab behavior remain stable after extraction.

phase_statuses.notes: - Frontend org-directory page and page hook decomposed into focused data, search, rebuild, tree, overview, and audit units while preserving the hook contract and test ids.

phase_statuses.title: Focused regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded org-directory refactor preserved both backend and frontend behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused backend and frontend org-directory tests pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - Focused backend pytest and frontend Jest org-directory regressions both passed against the final refactored code state, and the task artifacts now capture commands, acceptance coverage, and residual risk.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构：以下一 tranche 聚焦 org directory 模块，拆分后端 org_directory rebuild/tree 逻辑与前端 OrgDirectoryManagement 页面和 hook，保持行为稳定并补齐验证。
